name: Landing Page Complete Pipeline
description: End-to-end pipeline for a premium landing page with brand, animations, 3D, images, video, and SEO

phases.name: Discovery & Brief
phases.input: Brand name + value prop + target audience
phases.output: DESIGN.md with direction, audience, and constraints

phases.name: Brand Identity
phases.output: Brand board, color palette, typography system, theme
phases.command: brandkit generates overview → color-expert picks palette → theme-factory creates theme

phases.name: Structure & UX
phases.output: Semantic HTML structure, content hierarchy, trunk test

phases.name: Visual Design
phases.output: Styled landing page with tokens, typography, grid
phases.command: ui-ux-pro-max tokens → ui-design applies → taste-skill refines → awesome-claude anti-slop

phases.name: Motion & Scroll Animations
phases.output: Scroll-triggered reveals, hover micro-interactions, page transitions
phases.command: emilkowalski-motion micro-interactions → gsap-scrolltrigger reveals → design-motion-principles audit

phases.name: Hero 3D / WebGL (Optional)
phases.output: Interactive 3D hero background or WebGL shader effect
phases.command: threejs scene setup → shader-dev custom effect → frame-liquid-bg-hero as fallback

phases.name: Image Generation
phases.output: Hero images, section backgrounds, icons, screenshots
phases.command: fal-generate hero images → imagegen icons → poster-hero CTA sections

phases.name: Video / Background (Optional)
phases.output: Animated video background, logo outro animation
phases.command: fal-kling-o3 generate clip → frame-logo-outro brand animation

phases.name: Responsive & Cross-Browser
phases.output: Fully responsive mobile/tablet/desktop with Apple HIG compliance
phases.command: ui-design responsive breakpoints → apple-hig iOS check → platform-design cross-platform

phases.name: SEO & AI Visibility
phases.output: Meta tags, structured data, sitemap, llms.txt, OKF
phases.command: roier-seo lighthouse audit → ai-seo AI optimization → seo fixes

phases.name: Final Audit & Polish
phases.output: Polished, production-ready landing page, all checks passed
phases.command: impeccable-design-polish full audit → visual-critique → web-design-guidelines → writing-guidelines

phases.name: Figma Library (Optional)
phases.output: Figma design library synced with code

exit_criteria: All 12 phases completed or explicitly skipped
WCAG AA: contrast, focus, aria verified
